prompt: Edit image 1: Redesign the existing logos using graphic styles and typography from images 2 & 5. Augment each modified logo with data visualization elements (bars, scores) and ranking labels, adopting the infographic format seen in images 3 & 4, to create a dynamic brand identity graphic.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 by transforming its content into a dynamic brand identity infographic. Redesign each of the 8 brand logos currently displayed in image 1, incorporating the graphic styles and diverse typographies from images 2 and 5. For each redesigned logo, integrate it into a distinct section within an overall infographic layout, adopting the structured ranking and data presentation formats seen in images 3 and 4. Specifically, each modified logo should be accompanied by a clear numerical ranking, a corresponding data visualization element (such as a horizontal bar chart or score indicator), and a textual score or metric. Ensure the final edited image presents a cohesive and dynamic brand ranking graphic.
objects: Eight distinct sections for brand data
Redesigned brand logos (8 total, including Nike, Coca-Cola, Fanta, Volkswagen, Lego, Starbucks, Vodafone, PayPal, Amazon)
Data visualization elements (e.g., horizontal bar charts, score indicators)
Typography styles inspired by images 2 and 5
Graphic motifs and elements reflecting images 2 and 5
Background and layout elements supporting a dynamic visual theme
